reviews.comment:
Los playeros exelentes....ahora el bar es un robo!!! Cuando van a dejar de robarle a la gente !!!!!
Verguenza.

(Translated by Google)
The beach bar staff are excellent... now the bar is a rip-off!!! When are they going to stop ripping people off?!
Shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPX1p1dHRRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Rapida atencion al cliente, la comida es fresca y abundante. Muy serviciales y atentos  los empleados, si quieren tomar un cafe y descansar un rato del viaje es el lugar indicado. Baños limpios y comodos.

(Translated by Google)
Fast customer service, fresh and plentiful food. The staff are very helpful and attentive; if you want to have a coffee and rest a while after your trip, this is the place. Clean and comfortable restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyX0l6ZFR3EAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Of all the ACAs, this one is truly the best: service, friendliness, cleanliness. I wish it were the example to follow.

reviews.comment:
Es una estación de servicio chica pero completa y buena atención. Con el nuevo trayecto de la ruta 8 queda cómodo para los que van para capital. Los que van para Córdoba tienen que dar una vuelta larga para llega.

(Translated by Google)
It's a small but well-equipped gas station with good service. With the new Route 8 alignment, it's convenient for those heading to the capital. Those going to Córdoba have to take a longer route to get there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyckx5dWRnEAE
